title: Lets Go Party Song Lyrics Mupparimanam
singerName: GV Prakash Kumar, MC Vicky, Varun Parandhaman
stanzas:
Lets Go Party Song Lyrics From #Mupparimanam
#letsgoparty 

Ullaasamaai urchaagamaai
kondaadadaa indha ulagai
pen pookkalai un pookkalaai
kaikorkkavaa kannaadi azhagai

kalyaanam venaam machi

thanneeril vanna vanna
meengal pola vazhuvom

pen poovai kayyil allu
perinbam kodi sollu
ullaasam vaazhvai vendru
neeyum uchcham thodudaa

vaa daa machaan
lets go party

lets go party
lets go party
lets go party
lets go party (2)

yen new year resolution
sathiyama sarakku 
adikka maatten

yen new year resolution
sathiyama dhammu
adikka maatten

kudigaaran pechu
vidinjaa pochu
yen figure moonji
marandhe pochu

naetrodu sogam odiponathe
indrodu life style maari ponathe
raththathil undu AB positive
naangal thaan endurm B positive

katikatti povom tidal parkuthaan
kaikatti endrum vazhmaattom naam
aagaayam enga ellai koduthaan
kuththaattam pottaa sakka poduthaan

vaa daa machaan 
lets go party
lets go party
lets go party
lets go party (3)

pennodu pesum anjal poova nee
kannaale pesum oonjal theevaa nee
android-il neethaan attai padamo
anbe un kadhal vittu vidumo

pen indri ulagil podhai illai
pen indri ulagil yedhum illai
unakkaana ponna catch pannudaa
avaloda lifea match pannudaa

Ullaasamaai urchaagamaai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the Lets Go Party song?

The song is an energetic and upbeat track meant to evoke feelings of celebration and joy.

Who are the singers of the Lets Go Party song?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar, MC Vicky, and Varun Parandhaman.

What role does the song play in the movie Mupparimanam?

In the movie, the song sets a lively and festive mood, enhancing the celebratory scenes.

Who composed the music for Lets Go Party?

The music was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was the song Lets Go Party released?

The song was released on January 30, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Lets Go Party from Mupparimanam is a high-energy dance number that captures the essence of celebration and joy. Sung by GV Prakash Kumar, MC Vicky, and Varun Parandhaman, the song is perfect for party scenes and festive occasions. Its lively beats and catchy lyrics make it an anthem for those who love to revel in the moment. The song's vibrant energy is infectious, encouraging listeners to let loose and enjoy the party atmosphere.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Lets Go Party from the movie Mupparimanam is an electrifying track that brings together the vibrant beats of GV Prakash Kumar with the dynamic vocals of MC Vicky and Varun Parandhaman. This song is a perfect anthem for celebrations, capturing the essence of joy and excitement. Dive into the pulsating rhythms and let the party vibes take over your senses!
stanzaMeanings: Celebrate happily and energetically, embrace this world. Hold the flowers of women in your hands. You don't need a mirror or a wedding, my friend. No tears needed, my friend. Like colorful fish in water, we glide. Hold the flower of joy in your hand and say happiness is abundant. Win life and reach the top, come on, friend, let's go party.
lets go party lets go party lets go party lets go party (2)
My New Year resolution is to never drink alcohol. My New Year resolution is to never smoke. If a drunkard talks, it's over. I forgot my girlfriend's face.
All the money my father gave me turned into alcohol.
Yesterday's sadness is gone, today's lifestyle has changed. In my blood, there's AB positive, we are always B positive.
We'll go hand in hand to Tidal Park, we'll never part. The sky is our limit, when we dance, it's amazing.

Come on, friend, let's go party lets go party lets go party lets go party (3) You are the flower that talks with women, you are the swing that talks with your eyes. Are you the app on Android? My love, will you leave?
Without women, there's no thrill in the world. Without women, there's nothing in the world. Catch the girl meant for you, match your life with hers.

Celebrate happily and energetically, embrace this world. Hold the flowers of women in your hands. You don't need a mirror or a wedding, my friend. No tears needed, my friend. Like colorful fish in water, we glide. Hold the flower of joy in your hand and say happiness is abundant. Win life and reach the top, come on, friend, let's go party.
lets go party lets go party lets go party lets go party (2) Wish you a happy new Year!!
